title: PET ADOPTIONS - 211info
text: CAT ADOPTION TEAM PET ADOPTIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides adoption services for cats and kittens. 14175 SW Galbreath Drive Sherwood, OR 97140 Eligibility: -Age 18 and older -Ability to have an indoor-only pet -Agree to adoption policy which can be viewed online and at the shelter -An adult whom the cat will be living with must meet with an adoption counselor prior to adoption Hours: Shelter: Tuesday-Saturday noon-6pm (adoptions end 30 minutes before closing) Closed: New Year’s Day, Easter Sunday, Memorial Day, Fourth of July, Labor Day, Thanksgiving, and Christmas Day Email (503) 925-8903 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 925-8903 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in to the shelter, schedule a visit to an offsite adoption center, or apply online. Adopters must be available to pick up their cat in person on the same day of the adoption. FEES: Adoption fees range from $65-$225 for cats and kittens under the age of 8. Adoption fees are waived for cats age 8 years and older. DOCUMENTS: Valid ID AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, Washington, and Yamhill Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus 97 stops at SW Tualatin-Sherwood Road and Gerda Lane. It is a 5 minute walk from the bus stop. Services: Animal Adoption Other Services Offered At This Location: DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - SPAY/NEUTER PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
